liturgicalTitle:
SECOND SUNDAY OF GREAT LENT
Commemoration of St. Gregory Palamas.

troparia.label: Troparion (5)
troparia.text:
Let us the faithful acclaim and worship the Word, co-eternal with the Father and the Spirit, and born of the Virgin
for our salvation. For He willed to be lifted up on the cross in the flesh, to suffer death and to raise the dead by His glorious
resurrection.
